name: crisp
description: Inventory scaffold for the Crisp REST API v1 connector. The official 220-operation surface is recorded in api_surface.json and cli_surface.json; executable streams, direct reads, binary policy, and reverse-ETL writes land in follow-up #204 subissues before this parent is ready.

risk.read: Crisp REST API reads may include website visitor, conversation, people, campaign, and helpdesk data; executable reads are not exposed by #205.
risk.write: Crisp REST API mutations can create, update, delete, import, export, or administer website resources; all writes remain blocked until typed reverse-ETL actions and approvals are declared.
risk.approval: Future reverse ETL writes require plan, preview, approval token, and typed confirmation for destructive/admin operations.
